assessment_name: AI Sales Assistant — Phase 3b: Full Compliance Audit (All 48 Controls)
notes: Complete audit incorporating all 40 automated controls plus 8 manually documented controls. Manual entries authored by Compliance Lead 2026-03-20. This represents a full compliance audit baseline suitable for auditor submission.

responses.notes: MANUAL: Architecture diagram v3.2 authored by Platform Engineering 2026-03-15. Diagram ID: ARCH-DIAG-2026-001 in Confluence. Covers all 4 agent containers, 12 tool integrations, VPC topology, and data flow annotations. Reviewed by CISO 2026-03-17.
Topology + Cloud API: ECS DescribeServices + topology graph confirmed 4-agent architecture. Task ARN: arn:aws:ecs:us-east-1:123456789012:service/ai-sales-cluster/orchestrator-svc.
Topology + Cloud API: 12 tool endpoints enumerated via API Gateway + topology scan. All routes IAM-authenticated.
Topology + Cloud API: Pinecone vector store + ElastiCache session context confirmed. Context window: 128k tokens.
Topology + Cloud API: Internal-only SG on agent message bus (sg-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8). TLS 1.3 enforced.
Topology + Cloud API: 4 container images with pinned digests in ECR. SBOM not yet generated — scheduled for next sprint.
Cloud API: Dedicated IAM roles per agent with OIDC federation. ARNs: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-orchestrator-role, arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-subagent-role.
Cloud API: MFA enforced via arn:aws:iam::123456789012:policy/EnforceMFA. Okta SSO via SAML confirmed.
Cloud API: IAM SimulatePrincipalPolicy confirmed least-privilege on all agent roles. No wildcard actions.
Cloud API: STS inline session policies available but dynamic per-request scope reduction not yet enforced.
Cloud API: 8 secrets in Secrets Manager with 30-day auto-rotation. No plaintext credentials in env vars.
Cloud API: MaxSessionDuration=3600s + token revocation via aws:TokenIssueTime condition confirmed.
Topology + Cloud API: gpt-4o-2024-08-06 (OpenAI). Model card URL: platform.openai.com/docs/models/gpt-4o.
Cloud API: Base OpenAI model only. Training data provenance relies on OpenAI's published documentation — no internal fine-tuning dataset.
Topology + Cloud API: No fine-tuning pipeline or RLHF adapters in ECR or topology graph.
Cloud API: CodePipeline with manual approval gate. Model version pinned in SSM.

MANUAL: Red-team exercise conducted 2026-02-10 by external firm (TrustLayer Security). Report ID: RT-2026-002. Adversarial ML testing (model inversion, prompt extraction) completed — 2 medium findings, 0 critical. Bias and fairness evaluation scheduled Q2 2026 pending dataset availability.
Cloud API: OpenAI API key restricted to orchestrator role in Secrets Manager. No other roles have access.
Topology + Cloud API: API Gateway validator + WAF WebACL + topology prompt guard node confirmed.
Cloud API: Lambda ai-sales-output-validator with PII redaction + grounding check confirmed.
Cloud API: ECS Fargate + per-agent task security groups confirmed.
Cloud API: VPC NACLs deny all inbound from 0.0.0.0/0. No internet gateway on agent subnet.

MANUAL: Adversarial ML threat model documented in RT-2026-002. Defenses against model inversion implemented (output truncation, rate limiting). Poisoning defenses: data pipeline integrity checks in place. Evasion defenses: partial — input perturbation detection scheduled Q2 2026.
Topology + Cloud API: Tool wrapper Lambda functions with strict schema validation on all 12 tool return edges confirmed.
Cloud API: IAM data boundary + Macie classification confirms no unintended data exfiltration paths.
Cloud API: Step Functions HITL wait-for-callback state on high-risk transitions. ARN: arn:aws:states:us-east-1:123456789012:stateMachine:ai-sales-workflow.
Cloud API: Emergency stop Lambda + Step Functions abort path confirmed.
Topology + Cloud API: AppConfig guardrail config (5 scope limits) deployed.
Cloud API: AI disclosure header confirmed. GDPR transparency documentation partially complete — data subject rights procedure drafted but not yet approved by DPO.
Cloud API: SQS escalation queue + PagerDuty + DLQ at 3 retries confirmed.

MANUAL: AI Risk Register (DOC-GOV-2026-001) drafted by Risk Management 2026-03-12. Covers 14 identified risks across 5 impact categories. Annual review cycle set. Pending CISO sign-off scheduled 2026-03-25.

MANUAL: AI Acceptable Use Policy v1.2 approved by Legal and CISO 2026-02-28. Published on internal intranet. Policy ID: POL-AI-2026-001. Covers prohibited uses, agent delegation limits, and employee obligations.

MANUAL: EU AI Act risk classification performed by Legal 2026-03-05. AI Sales Assistant classified as Limited Risk (automated customer interaction). High-risk determination not triggered. Documentation pending external legal review before filing.
MANUAL: Conformity assessment initiated 2026-03-10. Technical documentation per Annex IV in progress. CE marking process not yet complete — expected Q3 2026 pending EU legal entity registration.

Cloud API + MANUAL: 4 vendors identified (OpenAI, Pinecone, Twilio, Salesforce). OpenAI and Salesforce SOC 2 Type II reports reviewed 2026-03-15. Pinecone and Twilio assessments pending — scheduled Q2 2026.

MANUAL: AI Incident Response Plan (DOC-IRP-2026-002) approved 2026-03-01. Covers AI-specific scenarios: model hallucination incidents, prompt injection attacks, agent runaway actions. Tabletop exercise completed 2026-03-08. Runbook integrated with PagerDuty.
Cloud API: CodePipeline manual approval gate + CloudTrail audit log confirmed for all model/prompt changes.
Cloud API: CloudWatch LogGroup with 90-day retention + structured JSON tracing confirmed.
Cloud API: CloudTrail with S3 log file validation + CloudWatch integration. Immutable audit trail verified.
Cloud API: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection on 3 metrics (2-week baseline). Full behavioral coverage requires additional manual threshold calibration.
Cloud API: CloudWatch Dashboard with drift alarms (5% threshold on token distribution, latency p99, error rate) confirmed.
Cloud API: X-Ray tracing active. Chain-of-thought logging implemented at application level but explainability output format not yet standardized.
Cloud API: Kinesis Firehose to Splunk confirmed. SIEM parsing rules in review — not yet validated by SOC team.
Cloud API: Macie classification active with PII, Confidential, Internal labels on ai-sales-data-prod.
Cloud API: Agent role restricted to 3 of 47 buckets. No unintended data access confirmed.
Cloud API + MANUAL: Macie PII detection active. GDPR Records of Processing Activities (ROPA) entry drafted 2026-03-18 — pending DPO review.
Cloud API: S3 lifecycle (90-day logs, 365-day audit) + CloudWatch 90-day retention confirmed.
Cloud API: SCPs deny non-EU/US region writes. CloudFront geo-restriction confirmed.
